hours.title: Office hours
hours.answer: We're open 8:00 AM to 6:00 PM US Pacific Time, Monday through Saturday. We're closed Sundays.

location.title: Location
location.answer: Our practice is at 123 Smile Street, Suite 200. Free parking is available in the lot behind the building.

insurance.title: Insurance
insurance.answer: We accept all major dental insurance plans including PPO, HMO, and DHMO. Bring your insurance card to your visit; we can verify benefits before treatment.

self_pay.title: Self-pay / no insurance
self_pay.answer: For patients without insurance, we offer self-pay options with transparent pricing. We also have membership plans and financing options to help make care affordable.

payment.title: Payment & financing
payment.answer: We accept cash, card, and most insurance. For larger treatments, we offer monthly financing plans and an in-house membership program for uninsured patients that covers preventive visits at a flat annual rate.

appointments.title: Appointments
appointments.answer: We recommend booking in advance, but we do our best to accommodate same-day or urgent visits when possible.

emergency.title: Emergency care
emergency.answer: If you're experiencing a dental emergency, we'll prioritize getting you seen as soon as possible. Please let us know what's going on so we can help.
